creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
Latest version of mail/spamassassin has problem with PRE-INSTALL script. There is an error in +MANIFEST file wich causes, that other packages could not be build (i.e. bug 223041).

I';ve detailed investigation at bug 223041. I hope it will help to resolve this problem. I'm not able to find correct place where PRE-INSTALL is generated.
